metadesc_interactive_playground_fo.en: Interactive playground for the Channel Messaging API - MessageChannel, MessagePort, iframe communication, and worker messaging demos.

h2_channel_messaging_vs_broa.en: Channel Messaging vs BroadcastChannel vs postMessage

subtitle_a_messagechannel_creates.en: A MessageChannel creates two linked MessagePort objects. Messages sent on one port are received on the other. This enables direct, private communication between contexts.

subtitle_messagechannel_enables_se.en: MessageChannel enables secure, direct communication with iframes. Transfer one port to the iframe via postMessage, then use the channel for ongoing private communication - no origin checks needed on every message.

subtitle_transfer_a_messageport_to.en: Transfer a MessagePort to a Web Worker for direct, typed communication. This avoids the global onmessage handler and enables multiple independent channels to the same worker.

subtitle_send_multiple_ports_for_s.en: Send multiple ports for separate concerns (e.g., one for data, one for control signals).

subtitle_ports_have_distinct_lifec.en: Ports have distinct lifecycle states. Understanding start(), close(), and transfer semantics is crucial for correct usage.

subtitle_when_using_addeventlisten.en: When using addEventListener (not onmessage), you must call port.start() explicitly. The onmessage setter calls start() implicitly.

subtitle_closing_a_port_prevents_f.en: Closing a port prevents further messages. The other port can still send, but messages are silently dropped.

subtitle_ports_are_transferable_on.en: Ports are transferable. Once transferred, the original reference becomes neutered (unusable).

subtitle_messageport_postmessage_u.en: MessagePort.postMessage uses the structured clone algorithm, supporting complex data types beyond JSON. Transferable objects can be moved (zero-copy) for performance.

subtitle_transferring_an_arraybuff.en: Transferring an ArrayBuffer moves it (zero-copy, original becomes detached). Cloning copies the data.

subtitle_watch_messages_flow_betwe.en: Watch messages flow between ports in real time. Each message triggers events that propagate through the channel.

subtitle_click_to_inspect_the_mess.en: Click to inspect the MessageEvent object received on a port.

subtitle_three_messaging_apis_serv.en: Three messaging APIs serve different use cases. Here's how they compare.

subtitle_see_all_three_apis_in_act.en: See all three APIs in action with the same message.
